_doc: Canonical Tepna roster + site metadata — the SINGLE source of truth for the deploy build + discoverability surfaces (REPO-DISCOVERABILITY-FOLLOWUPS-2026-07-04 §5.2). tools/build-docs.mjs reads THIS to (1) sync root→docs page bodies and (2) emit docs/{sitemap.xml,robots.txt,feed.xml,about.json,llms.txt,llms-full.txt}. The README node table, the DOCS-INDEX at-a-glance block, and the index.html JSON-LD all describe the same roster — keep them in sync with this file, do not fork a second roster.

deploy._note: docs/ is the served GitHub-Pages root (docs/SITE-DEPLOY-AND-LAYOUT.md §D). tools/build-docs.mjs syncs root→docs deploy files — HTML page bodies (Phase 1a) AND css/js/image assets (Phase 1b, byte-compare + copy): straight-copy pages that link only to shipped targets; MECHANICALLY de-link pages that link to non-public targets (Tier-3 tools/gates + any raw .md → <span class=tool-off>, reproduces the hand-de-linked wiring pages byte-for-byte); and PRESERVE delinkPreserve pages (editorially de-linked — Science.html reworded its lab-bench prose, so a generic transform can't reproduce it). --force-delink overrides preserve; --check covers the whole served tree.

site.name: Tepna
site.tagline: Read your nervous system like a weather report.
site.description: A fleet of local-only, single-signal physiological analyzers. Read one raw biosignal from a wearable you own — oxygen, heartbeat, pulse, glucose — derive evidence-graded metrics, and fuse across signals. 100% in your browser: no upload, no account.
site.author: Michal Planicka
site.intendedUse: Personal self-quantification. Not a medical device; does not diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any condition.

nodes.summary: Overnight blood oxygen — ODI-4, T90, hypoxic burden.
Optical pulse → PPI → HRV + pulse-wave morphology.
Continuous glucose → Time in Range, GMI.
EDF therapy data → pressure, leak, respiratory events.

fusion.summary: Cross-node fusion over the shared Ganglior event bus.
Routes each dropped file to the right node.
Runs a whole folder of mixed exports at once.

content.label: Science
content.description: Tepna's validation lab bench: synthetic-corpus experiments, reference-free σ estimation across sensors, and the honest-HR methodology behind every metric.

content.label: Architecture
content.description: How Tepna is built — local-first, zero-backend, evidence-graded: the shared spine, the two gates, and the design principles every analyzer node inherits.

content.label: How to Collect Data
content.description: Record your own biosignals for Tepna: device-by-device capture guides for O2Ring oximetry, Polar H10 ECG, Verity Sense PPG, CGM glucose, and CPAP therapy data.

content.label: About
content.description: Why Tepna exists: read one raw biosignal from a wearable you own, keep it 100% on your device, and get evidence-graded answers — no account, no upload, no product.

content.label: Papers
content.description: Working preprints behind Tepna's methods: reference-free uncertainty, the three-cornered-hat sensor validation, and the honest-HR derivations. Local, open, Apache-2.0.
